expectations.text: behavioral_check: Explains that encoding_interval trains the place-field / receptive-field model; decoding_interval is where the trained model is applied
expectations.evidence: Encoding_interval bullet: 'spikes / waveform features and concurrent position are used to fit the encoding model: place fields ... or the spike–feature–position joint density'; decoding_interval bullet: 'fitted model is evaluated to produce the posterior P(position | spikes)'.

expectations.text: behavioral_check: Gives a same-interval use (within-run reconstruction) and a different-interval use (train on run, decode replay during sleep / reward)
expectations.evidence: Case 1 'Full-session run-epoch decoding' (same interval); Case 2.1 'Train on run, decode on rest / sleep / SWR ripples (replay decoding)' with encoding=run, decoding=sleep/SWR.
